title: Add AgentStep/AgentPlan/AgentResult types + extend SessionMode
context_files: src/lib/interpreter/types.ts (lines 1-10: existing SessionMode and type patterns to extend)
src/lib/interpreter/typeGuards.ts (lines 1-11: existing isSessionMode guard to extend for 'agent')
acceptance_criteria: SessionMode type includes 'agent' alongside existing 'assistant' and 'interpreter'
isSessionMode() type guard in typeGuards.ts recognizes 'agent'
AgentStep type exported: id, description, tool?, status (pending|running|completed|failed), result?, error?
AgentPlan type exported: input, steps, currentStep, totalSteps
AgentResult type exported: plan, finalOutput, completedSteps
AgentLoopState type exported: plan, completedSteps, status (planning|executing|completed|failed)
AgentLoopResult type exported: plan, finalOutput, completedSteps, status
TaskStep type exported: id, description, tool?, status (pending|running|completed|failed), result?
TaskPlan type exported: originalInput, steps, currentStepIndex
TypeScript compiles with no errors: npx tsc --noEmit
